# Cat Break

> A free Chrome extension that limits time on websites by showing a cat video overlay when your limit is exceeded.

## What it is

Cat Break is a screen-time management Chrome extension for people who want to spend less time on social media and distracting websites. When a user exceeds their configured time limit on a site, a cat video plays as a full-screen overlay — hard to ignore, but not punishing.

- Free, no account required, no ads
- Available on the Chrome Web Store
- All data is local (chrome.storage); nothing is transmitted externally

## Who it's for

- People who lose track of time on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, X (Twitter), or Reddit
- Anyone who wants a passive, low-friction screen-time nudge without hard blocking
- Users who find notification-based tools too easy to dismiss

## How it works

1. User sets a default time limit (e.g., 30 minutes) for all sites
2. Optionally sets per-site overrides (e.g., youtube.com → 15 minutes)
3. Cat Break tracks active tab time — only while the tab is focused
4. When the limit is hit, a cat video appears on the page
5. The overlay auto-dismisses after a configurable linger time (default: 2 minutes)
6. Daily totals reset at midnight

## Key features

- Default time limit (applies to all sites)
- Per-site limit overrides
- Excluded sites list (never tracked)
- Cat linger duration setting
- Choice of 4 cat videos
- Daily usage stats per site
- Privacy-first: zero data collection

## Links

- Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/cat-break/lnmigkmapjkmfpnjlhnmdkihpnlihagh
- Privacy policy: https://github.com/parthbhodia/gatekeep-lock-chrome-extension/blob/main/PRIVACY.md
- Source code: https://github.com/parthbhodia/gatekeep-lock-chrome-extension

## Pricing

Free. No tiers, no subscription, no ads.
